buildingDepartment.name: San Francisco Department of Building Inspection (DBI)
buildingDepartment.address: 49 South Van Ness Ave, San Francisco, CA 94103
buildingDepartment.digitalSubmittalNote: 100% electronic submittal accepted; registered contractors can pull many permits online via PermitSF

planningDepartment.name: San Francisco Planning Department
planningDepartment.address: 49 South Van Ness Ave, Suite 1400, San Francisco, CA 94103

fireAgency.name: San Francisco Fire Department (SFFD)
fireAgency.address: 49 South Van Ness Ave, Suite 560, San Francisco, CA 94103
fireAgency.residentialExemption: 1- and 2-unit residential buildings exempt from general SFFD plan check

healthDepartment.name: SF Department of Public Health — Environmental Health
healthDepartment.notes: Required for all food facility permits including restaurants, bars, bakeries. Apply ≥6 weeks before planned opening.

seismicNote: Entire city is SDC D. No parcel-level determination needed. Hayward Fault Zone traces Eastern Neighborhoods — geotechnical investigation required for new construction within Alquist-Priolo zone.
wuiNote: LRA 2024 FHSZ designations released March 2025. Designated areas: Twin Peaks, McLaren Park, Mt. Davidson slopes, Presidio perimeter, Bernal Heights ridge. Majority of SF parcels are NOT in FHSZ.

allElectricOrdinance.applies: All new buildings — SFR, ADU (new construction), multi-unit, commercial
allElectricOrdinance.doesNotApply: Additions/alterations to existing buildings with gas in place
allElectricOrdinance.exception: Gas cooking equipment in commercial kitchens and restaurants
allElectricOrdinance.waiverPath: SFBC §106A.1.17 — technical infeasibility waiver with third-party professional review

softStoryProgram.applies: Wood-frame, 3+ stories (or 2-story over basement), 5+ units, built before 1978
